assertions.description: The panelized board multiplies the single board's 64 footprints across 24 panel instances (4-column x 6-row), yielding approximately 1519 footprints (24*64=1536 minus panel-specific exclusions). Board dimensions 116.8x168.6mm are consistent with a 4x6 grid of 25.4mm boards with V-score rails. 1848 vias (24*77=1848), 4488 track segments, and 24 GND zones all confirm 24x replication.

INCORRECT: The panelized board (24 copies on a panel) shows unrouted_count=5 and routing_complete=false. However, all 5 'unrouted' nets are intentionally-unconnected pad nets: unconnected-(J1-NC-PadNC1), unconnected-(J1-NC-PadNC2), unconnected-(J2-NC-PadNC1), unconnected-(J2-NC-PadNC2), and unconnected-(U1-NC-Pad4). These are NC pins that have 24 pads each (one per board copy) but no routing is expected. The single-board version correctly shows routing_complete=true. This is a false alarm in the panelized context.
